basic_details.organization_name: CSIR Human Resource Development Group (CSIR HRDG)
basic_details.short_information: CSIR Human Resource Development Group (CSIR HRDG) Consultant Notification 2026 has been released on 20 July 2026 on the official website https://csirhrdg.res.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the CSIR HRDG Consultant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 64 years for all posts.

qualification.details: Consultant (Administration): Graduation from any recognized university/institution Consultant (Finance & Accounts): Graduation from any recognized university/institution

salary_details.details: Consultant (Administration): Last Basic Pay Drawn - Basic Pension Consultant (Finance & Accounts): Last Basic Pay Drawn - Basic Pension

all_official_links.label: Download CSIR HRDG Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CSIR HRDG Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CSIR HRDG Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CSIR HRDG Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CSIR HRDG Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Consultant (Administration): Graduation from any recognized university/institution Consultant (Finance & Accounts): Graduation from any recognized university/institution

content_sections.heading: CSIR HRDG Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 64 years for all posts.

content_sections.heading: CSIR HRDG Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Consultant (Administration): Last Basic Pay Drawn - Basic Pension Consultant (Finance & Accounts): Last Basic Pay Drawn - Basic Pension

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for CSIR HRDG Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for CSIR HRDG Recruitment 2026 is scheduled for 27th July 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the Consultant posts is Graduation from any recognized university or institution. Specific details for each post are available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Consultant posts is 64 years. There is no minimum age limit specified for these positions.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Consultant posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Consultant posts, with one each for Consultant (Administration) and Consultant (Finance & Accounts).

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for CSIR HRDG Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The salary for the Consultant posts will be based on the Last Basic Pay Drawn minus Basic Pension. This ensures that the compensation is aligned with the candidate's previous drawn salary.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for CSIR HRDG Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Consultant posts will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110012. The exact address will be mentioned in the official notification PDF.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs. This includes ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contractual job. The recruitment is for Consultant posts on a contractual basis, offering a temporary employment opportunity.
